headline: Is It Time To Reassess Philip Morris (PM) After Recent Price Pullback And DCF Gap
summary: If you are wondering whether Philip Morris International is priced attractively at the moment, the key question is how its current share price compares to its underlying value. The stock recently closed at US$163.24, with returns of 11.5% over the last year and very large gains over the last 5 years, despite recent 7 day and 30 day declines of 6.6% and 11.0% and a 1.8% return year to date. Recent news coverage has largely focused on the ongoing shift in the tobacco industry toward reduced...

headline: Best Stock to Buy and Hold Forever: Altria Group vs. Philip Morris International
summary: Marlboro has propped up these two tobacco giants for decades. However, the future will depend on each company's ability to pivot.
